name: Secret Crush -Unrequited love-
short_description: My second spring in high school. Surrounded by my dreamy upperclassman, that classmate I'm interested in, and my childhood friend who's a year younger than me. She's been in the search for a boyfriend who would look at her, and only her. The protagonist Chika decides to confess her feelings to……
detailed_description:
I

always thought it was a hopeless romance――

"Secret Crush -Unrequited love-", a text ADV distributed through the iOS/Andoroid app game "My Lovey:Choose your otome story", is now available on Steam.

●Notes.

・This work is identical in content to "Secret Crush -Unrequited love-" distributed through the "My Lovey:Choose your otome story" iOS/Android app.

・This game is based on the app version, so it will be displayed in portrait resolution.

・There are no in-game fees.

●Game System

As you read the story, choices will appear.

Depending on the choice you make, the story will change.

Card illustrations can be obtained according to the number of times you play the game.

A gallery mode is also available to view card illustrations and stills from the app version of the game.

●Story

My second spring in high school. Surrounded by my dreamy upperclassman, that classmate I'm interested in, and my childhood friend who's a year younger than me. She's been in the search for a boyfriend who would look at her, and only her. The protagonist Chika decides to confess her feelings to……

●Character

Soshi Kujo

"I think you're a really nice girl. I'm glad we're classmates."

The protagonist's classmate. A model student, he is known for his intelligence and calm demeanor. He belongs to the archery club, and is good at taking care of others.

Kotaro Kurumi

"I can't overcome my hatred for girls that easily. You're…kind of the exception."

Although he has adorable features, he is very impulsive and is quick to use violence.

He is in the same grade as the protagonist.

Reo Takatsuki

"Sure, okay. Let's go out."

He is the captain of the tennis team and is the most populay guy in school. Not only does he excel in sports, he has the looks and the family heritage to go along with it.

Masaki Kirigaya

"The type of girls I like?……A girl that makes me want to protect her, I guess?"

A childhood friend, who has just entered the same high school.

There's no one else who understands the protagonist more than him.

Chika Nakamura(*Name can be changed.)

"I've always wanted to go out with someone when I entered high school."

Protagonist.

A social butterfly, she has amazing social skills. She has many friends in her circle, regardless of gender.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean
